coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that provides an interactive side-panel navigation widget allowing users to search, browse, and jump to video cue points including chapters, slides, hotspots, captions, Q&A items, and quiz questions.

featureOwnership: Side-panel navigation widget with search and filter capabilities
Quiz question navigation with state tracking (answered/unanswered/correct/incorrect)
Auto-scroll to currently active cue point
Tab-based filtering by cue point type
Timeline marker integration for chapters and hotspots
Live stream cue point handling with future cue point buffering
Keyboard accessibility and screen reader support

managedStates: Active cue points map (highlighted items per type)
Live future cue points map (pending cue points not yet reached)
dataObjects: ItemData - processed cue point data for UI rendering
CuePoint - raw timed metadata from kaltura-cuepoints plugin
SearchFilter - current search query, active tab, available tabs
HighlightedMap - map of item types to their active start times

repositories.name: playkit-js-kaltura-cuepoints
repositories.role: Provides CuePointManager service and raw cue point data through TIMED_METADATA_ADDED and TIMED_METADATA_CHANGE events

repositories.name: playkit-js-ui-managers
repositories.role: Provides SidePanelsManager and UpperBarManager services for UI integration

repositories.name: playkit-js-timeline
repositories.role: Provides TimelineManager service for adding chapter/hotspot markers to the timeline

repositories.name: kaltura-player-js
repositories.role: Core player framework providing BasePlugin, event system, and player state

services: kalturaCuepoints - CuePointManager for registering and receiving cue point types

kalturaApis: Kaltura Cue Points API (via kaltura-cuepoints plugin)
Kaltura Thumb Assets API (for slide preview images)
Kaltura Caption Assets API (for transcript data)

sourceOfTruthFiles: src/navigation-plugin.tsx - Core plugin logic, cue point processing, player event handling
src/components/navigation/index.tsx - Main Navigation UI component with search/filter logic
src/types/navigation-item-data.ts - ItemTypes enum and data structures
src/utils/index.ts - Cue point processing, filtering, and sorting utilities

errorPatterns: kalturaCuepoints, sidePanelsManager or upperBarManager haven't registered

configurationOptions.itemsOrder: Tab/item ordering and filtering: Record<string, number>
